Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of Twin Stars]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon writes 'The Path of Twin Stars' at the top of a page in his manual.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Path of Twin Stars allows a person to theoretically hold two types of madra in the same body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Heart of Twin Stars technique manual is now Lindon's instruction manual for the Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon keeps records for the Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon must cycle according to the Path of Twin Stars to restore his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon scrawled the Enforcer technique into the Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon possesses the Path of Twin Stars.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon records his advancement in The Path of Twin Stars manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan is interested in Lindon's Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Path of Twin Stars manual was in his pack.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Path of Twin Stars does not have an actual Enforcer technique for Lindon.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has not developed a full-body Enforcer technique for his Path of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Path of Twin Stars takes a long time to raise.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon consulted his Path of Twin Stars manual to find a solution to his hunger madra problem.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan has more right to the Path of Twin Stars than anyone but Lindon and Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon switched to the Path of Twin Stars.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Path of Twin Stars is a book.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
